headline: Senior ML Engineer | LLMs | RAG | LangChain | 6 Years
summary: Senior ML Engineer with 6 years building production LLM systems. Led RAG pipelines serving 10M queries/day. Expert in LangChain, LangGraph, MLOps and multi-agent systems.

experience.title: Senior ML Engineer
experience.description: Built LLM agent platform using LangGraph and AutoGen. RAG pipeline on Pinecone and FastAPI. MLOps on Kubernetes with MLflow.

experience.title: ML Engineer
experience.description: NLP pipelines using LangChain and HuggingFace. Deployed models on Azure ML with Docker and CI/CD.

experience.title: Junior ML Engineer
experience.description: Recommendation engine using collaborative filtering. Python, scikit-learn, SQL.

projects.name: Enterprise LLM Agent Platform
projects.description: Multi-agent system using LangGraph serving Fortune 500 clients. 50M tokens/day in production.

projects.name: Open Source RAG Toolkit
projects.description: 800+ GitHub stars. Modular RAG framework supporting multiple vector stores.

publications: NeurIPS 2022 — Efficient Attention Mechanisms for Edge Deployment
